name: Vahini-20-Factor-Handwriting-Analyser-SBOM
comment: Software Bill of Materials for the Vahini 20-Factor Handwriting Analyser web application. The browser engine is 100% first-party JavaScript (no bundled third-party code libraries — no OpenCV, Tesseract, jQuery, React, etc.). Third-party components are limited to web fonts loaded at runtime, two optional/server-side or hosted services, and the deployment web server.

packages.name: vahini-20-factor-analyser
packages.comment: The Vahini 20-Factor Analyser: deterministic computer-vision engine (packed), report renderer, browser app, and pluggable Python OCR server. Free software under GNU AGPL-3.0-only; the dual-IMU handwriting-motion sensing method is the subject of Indian Patent No. 584433.

packages.name: spectral
packages.comment: Serif display/body font, loaded at runtime from fonts.googleapis.com.

packages.name: hanken-grotesk
packages.supplier: Person: Alfredo Marco Pradil (via Google Fonts)
packages.copyrightText: Copyright 2020 The Hanken Grotesk Project Authors
packages.comment: Sans-serif UI/body font, loaded at runtime from fonts.googleapis.com.

packages.name: caveat
packages.comment: Handwriting accent font used for sample/expected passages.

packages.name: edu-sa-beginner
packages.supplier: Organization: EduType / Australian Type Foundry (via Google Fonts)
packages.comment: Beginner-handwriting model font used in practice/sample sheets.

packages.name: paddleocr
packages.comment: OPTIONAL, server-side only. Text recognition (detect + read) used on the heavy server path to confirm which characters were attempted. It is NOT bundled in the browser app and is never the basis of a handwriting score. Not present unless a recognition server is configured.

packages.name: nginx
packages.copyrightText: Copyright (C) Igor Sysoev, Copyright (C) Nginx, Inc.
packages.comment: Deployment web server (see deploy/nginx.conf and Dockerfile). Used to serve static files; not part of the shipped client bundle.

packages.name: goqr-api
packages.comment: Hosted QR-image service (api.qrserver.com) called at runtime in the optional share flow to render a QR for a share link. No code is redistributed; the service is free for commercial and non-commercial use per goQR.me terms. Has a graceful offline fallback (link shown directly).

packages.name: google-analytics-gtm
packages.comment: Proprietary hosted analytics service (Google Analytics 4 + Google Tag Manager) injected at runtime by site.js. Governed by Google's Terms of Service, not an open-source licence.

hasExtractedLicensingInfos.name: Google APIs / Analytics Terms of Service
hasExtractedLicensingInfos.extractedText: Use of Google Analytics and Google Tag Manager is governed by the Google Analytics Terms of Service and the Google APIs Terms of Service, not an open-source licence. See https://marketingplatform.google.com/about/analytics/terms/us/ .
